canva.background: Sarah leads the Web Platform team at Canva, focusing on scalability and performance. She has spoken at major engineering conferences and published articles on frontend architecture.
canva.askThis: How do you handle scaling challenges with millions of concurrent users?
canva.mentionThis: Your talk on frontend architecture at ReactConf 2024 was insightful.

canva.background: Marcus works on the API infrastructure team and is a regular contributor to Canva's engineering blog. He has deep expertise in building scalable systems.
canva.askThis: What's your tech stack for handling real-time collaboration?
canva.mentionThis: Your blog post on system design was shared across our team.

canva.background: Emma mentors junior engineers and leads architecture reviews across the platform team. She contributes to several open-source projects.
canva.askThis: How do you approach technical mentoring at scale?
canva.mentionThis: Your GitHub contributions show exceptional technical depth.

atlassian.background: James leads the Jira Cloud infrastructure team and regularly speaks at engineering conferences. He's known for his work on distributed systems reliability.
atlassian.askThis: How do you ensure reliability across distributed microservices?
atlassian.mentionThis: Saw your talk at KubeCon about Kubernetes at scale — very relevant.

atlassian.background: Lisa works on the Confluence team and is active in the frontend community. She has published articles on React patterns and modern web architecture.
atlassian.askThis: What lessons have you learned building large-scale collaboration tools?
atlassian.mentionThis: Your Medium article on React patterns is highly cited.

atlassian.background: David manages the platform reliability team and is known for building strong engineering cultures. He mentors engineers across the company.
atlassian.askThis: How do you build high-performing engineering teams?
atlassian.mentionThis: Your insights on engineering culture align perfectly with our values.

linear.background: Arjun is a core Linear team member working on the issue tracking engine. He's a prolific open-source contributor with exceptional technical skills.
linear.askThis: How do you balance shipping fast with maintaining code quality?
linear.mentionThis: Your open-source projects show exceptional quality — exactly what we look for.

linear.background: Sofia builds Linear's TypeScript infrastructure and frontend. She's widely recognized for performance optimization expertise in the React ecosystem.
linear.askThis: How do you approach performance optimization in a web app?
linear.mentionThis: Your blog posts on React optimization are referenced in our codebase.

linear.background: Thomas works on Linear's data layer and database optimization. He's active in the DevTools community and known for infrastructure excellence.

linear.mentionThis: Your contributions to the TypeScript ecosystem are impressive.
